body:
<!-- Provide a clear description of the content -->

This PR updates the implicit solver in our ClimaCore examples to use the `MatrixFields` interface, brining it in alignment with the implicit solver in ClimaAtmos.

## Updates to Examples and Tests
- Replace `compose`, `operator2stencil`, and `StencilCoefs` in the tendency Jacobian with their new versions: `⋅`, `operator_matrix`, and `BandMatrixRow` from `MatrixFields`
  - Since `operator_matrix` supports upwinding, add the missing upwinding derivative to the tendency Jacobian
- Replace scalar Jacobian entries with vector, covector, and tensor entries, so that they match the ones in ClimaAtmos
  - To avoid modifying the `Wfact!` function and making it set `dtγ * ∂Yₜ∂Y - I` instead of `∂Yₜ∂Y`,  this required adding support for scalar multiplication/division of matrices, as well as support for identity matrices with non-scalar elements to `MatrixFields`
- Remove the autodiff testing functionality from the implicit solver, as it needs to be reimplemented in a way that supports non-scalar entries
- Remove the `linsolve` test from CI, as it was testing an outdated duplicate of the Thomas algorithm from `MatrixFields`

## Updates to Internals
- Allow `FieldMatrix` broadcasts to include multiplication and division by single values (`Number`s, `AxisTensor`s, or broadcast expressions that return `Number`s or `AxisTensor`s)
- Allow multiples of identity matrix blocks in a `FieldMatrix` to be represented as either `UniformScaling`s for `Number`s or `DiagonalMatrixRow`s for `Axis2Tensor`s
- Fix the behavior of `one(::FieldMatrix)`
  - Ensure that the identity matrix block for a `ColumnwiseBandMatrixField` of `Axis2Tensor`s is also an `Axis2Tensor`
  - Enable better handling of sparse matrices, so that `one(matrix)` will contain an identity matrix block for each variable that appears as a row or column index, even if `matrix` does not contain the corresponding diagonal entry
- Add an alternative to `one(::FieldMatrix)`, `identity_field_matrix(::FieldVector)`, which captures missing identity matrix blocks for very sparse matrices
  - E.g., if `matrix` does not contain any blocks with `Y.c.uₕ` as a row or column value, `one(matrix)` will not contain an identity block for `Y.c.uₕ`, but `identity_field_matrix(Y)` will contain `(@name(c.uₕ), @name(c.uₕ)) => I`
  - This can be used to fill in missing diagonal blocks in a sparse `FieldMatrix`, so that it can be passed to a `FieldMatrixSolver`
- These changes will allow us to simplify the implicit solver in ClimaAtmos, since we can now subtract `I` and multiply by `dtγ` automatically, instead of relying on developers to do this manually for each matrix block
- Add broadcasting support to `FieldMatrixWithSolver`, as well as a definition of `one(::FieldMatrixWithSolver)`, so that we do not need to directly access the internal `matrix` when subtracting `I` and multiplying by `dtγ`

---

- [x] Code follows the [style guidelines](https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/DevDocs/CodeStyle/) OR N/A.
- [x] Unit tests are included OR N/A.
- [x] Code is exercised in an integration test OR N/A.
- [x] Documentation has been added/updated OR N/A.
title: Update examples to use new implicit solver interface
Mv ncolumns to Spaces, define nlevels on fields

body:
<!-- Provide a clear description of the content -->

This PR removes the remnants of the original implicit solver interface, consisting of the files `stencilcoefs.jl`, `operator2stencil.jl`, `pointwisestencil.jl`, and `thomas_algorithm.jl`. The operators and data structures in these files have been superseded by the `MatrixFields` module, which has been rigorously tested and documented. There is no longer any code in `ClimaAtmos`, `ClimaLand`, or the `ClimaCore` examples that uses the outdated interface.

- [x] Code follows the [style guidelines](https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/DevDocs/CodeStyle/) OR N/A.
- [x] Unit tests are included OR N/A.
- [x] Code is exercised in an integration test OR N/A.
- [x] Documentation has been added/updated OR N/A.
title: Remove outdated implicit solver interface
